codeReview.summary: Clean, well-scoped change. The worker correctly updated the clubs category marker color from #765898 to #BF00FF in all three required locations: (1) data/places.ts CATEGORIES constant, (2) data/__tests__/places.test.ts color assertion, and (3) .factory/library/eva-design.md Category Marker Colors table. The worker correctly identified that #765898 references in globals.css (--color-nerv-purple) and lib/map/map-style.ts (buildingHigh) are for the general Eva Unit-01 Purple design token used for building extrusions — not the clubs marker color — and left them unchanged. No hardcoded clubs-specific #765898 references existed in CSS or components. All 129 tests pass and build succeeds.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The fullstack-worker skill prescribes a strict RED-GREEN TDD cycle (step 2: 'Write failing tests first'), but for a simple color constant change like this, the worker pragmatically edited all 3 files together and ran tests afterward. This is the correct approach for value changes — the TDD procedure doesn't map well to non-functional changes. The skill could note that for simple value/config changes, the TDD step can be skipped.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript shows worker made all 3 edits simultaneously then ran pnpm test, rather than first writing a failing test. Skill step 2 says 'Write failing tests first (RED)' but this is a color hex swap, not new functionality.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker did not explicitly run pnpm lint as a separate step (skill step 4 lists lint as a required check). Worker ran pnpm test and pnpm build but not pnpm lint. For this trivial change (3 string replacements) the risk is negligible, but the skill procedure was technically not fully followed.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff verification.commandsRun lists pnpm test and pnpm build but not pnpm lint. Skill step 4 says: 'pnpm lint — no lint errors (if configured)'. services.yaml confirms lint command exists: 'lint: pnpm lint'.

summary: PASS. The change-clubs-color feature is correctly implemented. Three files changed with surgical precision: clubs marker color updated from #765898 to #BF00FF in the CATEGORIES constant, the corresponding test assertion, and the design system documentation. The worker correctly preserved #765898 in unrelated contexts (CSS variable and building extrusion color). No bugs, no edge cases missed, no convention violations. Minor procedural gaps (no explicit lint run, no TDD cycle for a value change) are justified given the trivial scope.
